scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:plugins && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:plugins: find ../plugins -name Cargo.toml -not -path '*/crates/*' | xargs -I {} cargo build --manifest-path {} --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.cleanup: find ../plugins -type d -name target -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf dist
